title: e2e: [manifest] authenticated push: Client sent an HTTP request to an HTTPS server
body:
#18355 is back. This is one of its many manifestations:
```
Podman manifest
  [It] authenticated push
  ...       
  $ podman [options] manifest create foo
  <sha1>
  $ podman [options] tag quay.io/libpod/testimage:20221018 localhost:5684/citest:latest
  $ podman [options] push -q --tls-verify=false --creds=userirSu:U1cZGUaERg4Pkbj --format=v2s2 localhost:5684/citest:latest
  Error: trying to reuse blob sha256:<sha2> at destination: pinging container registry localhost:5684: \
      StatusCode: 400, "Client sent an HTTP request to an HTTPS server.\n"
```


* debian-13 : int podman debian-13 rootless host sqlite
    * [02-05 21:38](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5414551533912064/html/int-podman-debian-13-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-manifest-authenticated-push--1) in Podman manifest authenticated push
    * [01-30 10:49](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4716811615207424/html/int-podman-debian-13-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-manifest-authenticated-push--1) in Podman manifest authenticated push

* rawhide : int podman rawhide rootless host sqlite
    * [02-06 11:21](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6252698094272512/html/int-podman-rawhide-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-manifest-authenticated-push--1) in Podman manifest authenticated push
    * [01-04-2024 22:56](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6175039851069440/html/int-podman-rawhide-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-manifest-authenticated-push--1) in Podman manifest authenticated push

There are many more instances of this, but I'm just starting a new PR to make it easy for me to categorize them in my flake catalog

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
